summary: Substitute the actual id into array-indexed batch form keys (messages[<id>], reviews[<id>]) instead of sending the literal {message_id}/{review_id} placeholder.
reason: Greptile P1: the form key was emitted verbatim as messages[{message_id}] / reviews[{review_id}], so Goodreads matched no row and the batch action silently no-oped.
